### Description:
Enhance your cleaning... Read More

### Description:

Enhance your cleaning efficiency with Fra-Ber’s professional-grade chemical-resistant spray bottles. Designed for precision and durability, each 1000ml bottle features a color-coded label (Blue, Black, Green) and an integrated dilution ratio guide (1:1 to 1:20) for quick and accurate mixing of cleaning solutions.

Perfect for automotive detailing, industrial cleaning, or home use, these ergonomic spray bottles are made from high-density plastic to withstand harsh chemicals. The rear dilution scale ensures the right blend of water and product every time, reducing waste and improving results.

Whether you're a professional or enthusiast, Fra-Ber spray bottles offer reliability, clarity, and control for all your cleaning needs.
